  • View page source

starry_unigraph.tasks.base module

Base task adapter with common utilities.

class starry_unigraph.tasks.base.BaseTaskAdapter[source]

Bases: object

Base class for task adapters. Subclass for specific tasks.

build_sample_config(chunk: Any, model: Any, split: str) → SampleConfig[source]

Build sampling config. Override in subclass.

compute_loss(model_output: Dict[str, Tensor], batch: BatchData) → Tensor[source]

Compute loss. Override in subclass.

compute_loss_old_api(output: Dict[str, Any]) → float[source]

Old API: extract loss from output dict directly. This is called if new compute_loss() fails.

compute_metrics(model_output: Dict[str, Tensor], batch: BatchData) → Dict[str, float][source]

Compute evaluation metrics. Override in subclass.

format_output(model_output: Dict[str, Tensor], batch: BatchData) → Dict[str, Any][source]

Format output for logging/saving. Default: return model_output.

format_prediction(output: Dict[str, Any]) → Dict[str, Any][source]

Old API: format prediction. Kept for backward compatibility.

task_type = 'base'
